title: Properties of LCL
wikitext:
[]: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by bananafaerie » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:02 pm Yes, I've already established the fact that "LCL is a gooey-ish orange liquid". However, if someone were to drink the LCL after 3I (It's a hypothetical situation, OK?) and someone were to reform out of that LCL, would they burst out of the person who drank it? :X EDIT: Why would they reform out of that LCL when there's a whole world full of LCL that isn't inside someone already?

[]: Re: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:43 pm bananafaerie wrote: Yes, I've already established the fact that "LCL is a gooey-ish orange liquid". However, if someone were to drink the LCL after 3I (It's a hypothetical situation, OK?) and someone were to reform out of that LCL, would they burst out of the person who drank it? :X

[]: Re: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:53 pm Azathoth wrote: Why would they reform out of that LCL when there's a whole world full of LCL that isn't inside someone already?

[]: Re: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:06 pm Gamer137 wrote: If a person hypothetically drank ALL of it I guess is what she means.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:16 pm A couple of old threads that has some LCL mechanics discussion: From ANF: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3778 Plugsuits and LCL Mechanics LCL Questions (not a whole lot more in this thread)

[]:             Quote Post by bananafaerie » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:45 pm Re-read my first message please

[]: Re: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Thu Aug 05, 2010 5:33 pm bananafaerie wrote: Yes, I've already established the fact that "LCL is a gooey-ish orange liquid". However, if someone were to drink the LCL after 3I (It's a hypothetical situation, OK?) and someone were to reform out of that LCL, would they burst out of the person who drank it? :X EDIT: *Assuming that the LCL the person drank was the LCL that someone was about to reform out of, sorry for bad wording.

[]: Re: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Aug 05, 2010 5:59 pm bananafaerie wrote: Yes, I've already established the fact that "LCL is a gooey-ish orange liquid". However, if someone were to drink the LCL after 3I (It's a hypothetical situation, OK?) and someone were to reform out of that LCL, would they burst out of the person who drank it? :X

[]: Re: Properties of LCL             Quote Post by Aozora » Fri Aug 06, 2010 10:01 am Azathoth wrote: I always figured his clothes were shaped from LCL by his AT field, along with Asuka's plugsuit/bandages. Based on the last mental image he had of himself, I guess he just decided to bring back everything he was wearing, too.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:50 pm Can someone make a .gif of someone drinking LCL, only for PenPen to bust out of their body?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Aug 06, 2010 5:12 pm I would pay money to see that.
